title: Discussing Acquisition Strategies For Small PR Agencies
description: Discussing acquisition strategies for small PR Agencies at the Nigerian Institute of Public Relations (NIPR), Lagos State Chapter PR Clinic / Monthly Meeting. With the theme: “Client Acquisition Strat
html: Discussing acquisition strategies for small PR Agencies at the Nigerian Institute of Public Relations (NIPR), Lagos State Chapter PR Clinic / Monthly Meeting. With the theme: “Client Acquisition Strategies For Small PR Agencies” Where Bolaji Abimbola, shared  knowledge and experience on the best strategies for acquiring new clients, including tips on networking, pitching and building relationships with potential clients.
